Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SExpr

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SExpr
All Implemented Interfaces:
Writable
public class SExpr extends Object implements Writable
This class models s-expressions to be used for the SMT translation.

Every s-expression has got a name and a (potentially empty) list of children.

They can be printed out, non-simple names are escaped for SMT.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    SExpr.Type
    An enumeration of the types that an SExpr can assume.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SExpr(SExpr... children)
    Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
    SExpr(String name)
    Create a new s-expr without children of type SExpr.Type.NONE.
    SExpr(String name, SExpr... children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
    SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type)
    Create a new s-expr without children, but with a given type.
    SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, SExpr... children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
    SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, String... children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
    SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, List<SExpr> children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
    SExpr(String name, String... children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
    SExpr(String name, List<SExpr> children)
    Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
    SExpr(List<SExpr> children)
    Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.

  • Constructor Details

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type)
      Create a new s-expr without children, but with a given type.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      type - the non-null type to use

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name)
      Create a new s-expr without children of type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      type - the non-null type to use
      children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, String... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type. The array of String children is mapped to a list of SExprs.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      type - the non-null type to use
      children - the list of children to use.

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, String... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE. The array of String children is mapped to a list of SExprs.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      children - the list of children to use.

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, SExpr.Type type, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      type - the non-null type to use
      children - the list of children to use.

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(String name, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the atom
      children - the list of children to use.

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      Parameters:
      children - the list of children to use.

    • SExpr

      public SExpr(List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      Parameters:
      children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere.

    • appendTo

      public void appendTo(StringBuilder sb)
      Append the SMTLIB2-representation of this object to the given string builder.
      Specified by:
      appendTo in interface Writable
      Parameters:
      sb - a non-null string builder to write to.

    • map

      public SExpr map(UnaryOperator<SExpr> mapFunction)
      Create a new SExpr by applying a function to all children of this object. The atomic name is not modified, nor is the function applied in depth.
      Parameters:
      mapFunction - a non-null function to be applied to the children.
      Returns:
      a new SEXpr with the same name and type and with the mapFunction applied to all children.
